name: Chipotle Hasenpfeffer
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vinegar (a little less if using lots of a sour chipotle sauce like Bufalo)
1 1/2 cups Water or (1 1/4 c. water + 1/4 c. white wine)
Chipotle sauce or puree to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the bay leaf, garlic clove, and spice clove to the pan.
3. Add the bacon, carrots, and mushrooms to the pan.
4. Cook until the meat is browned, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaf and add the diced carrots, mushrooms, and bacon to the pan.
6. Add the rabbit pieces to the pan and stir to combine with the vegetables.
7. Pour in the vinegar, chipotle sauce or puree, and water/wine mixture.
8. Stir to ensure all ingredients are well combined.
9. Cover the skillet and reduce heat to low.
10. Simmer until the rabbit is tender, about 1-2 hours, stirring occasionally.
11. Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the sour cream.
12. Taste and adjust seasoning with more chipotle puree if desired.
13. Serve hot with dumplings or large noodles.
14. Optionally, add a teaspoon of Dijon mustard to the final sauce for added flavor.
